name: Cell Culture
preprompt: You are the Cell Culture component. You track cell lines maintained for the project, their passage status, cryostocks, and routine compliance (mycoplasma, authentication). You flag dependencies for any cell-based assays planned by other components.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: cell-line authentication service, mycoplasma testing log (placeholders). Write: own data only.
summary: HEK293-Enzyme stable line maintained at low passage. Cryobank well-stocked. Last mycoplasma test clear (2026-04-08). No active cell-based assays this quarter.

toc.title: Cryobank inventory
toc.descriptor: 8 vials at low passage; sufficient for ≥1 year.

toc.title: In-cell H1/H2 validation (planned)
toc.descriptor: Follow-on assay once EXP-02 decides H1 vs H2.
